headline: Intel, Other Chip Stocks Take a Chill Pill After Dizzying Runup
summary: Intel  stock and shares of other semiconductor companies were falling back Tuesday morning after a Monday rally that sent many of them to record highs.  “A mildly risk-off tone has taken over after Monday’s record close,”  Mizuho’s  Managing Director of Equity Trading, Daniel O’Regan, wrote in a Tuesday morning note.  Both the  and  were down about half a point Tuesday morning.
